# arubasdwan_app_port_protocol (Resource)

Manages a port/protocol application classification in the Aruba SD-WAN Orchestrator. Uses the /gms/rest/applicationDefinition/portProtocolClassification API endpoints.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "arubasdwan_app_port_protocol" "example" {
  name        = "InternalAPI"
  port        = 8443
  protocol    = 6
  description = "Internal API service"
  confidence  = 50
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the port/protocol classification.
- `port` (Number) The port number for this port/protocol classification.
- `protocol` (Number) The protocol number (e.g. 6 for TCP, 17 for UDP).

### Optional

- `confidence` (Number) The confidence level of the application classification (0-100). Defaults to 50.
- `description` (String) A description for the port/protocol classification. Defaults to "".
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the port/protocol classification is disabled. Defaults to false.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier: port_protocol (e.g. "8443_6").
